name: Mountain Home High School
description: Come play pickleball at Mountain Home High School in Mountain Home, ID! There is 1 indoor hard court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The court is private.

name: Recreation Activity Center
description: Recreation Activity Center is a place to play pickleball in Mountain Home, ID. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Amenities include lights.

name: Richard Aguirre Park
description: Richard Aguirre Park is a place to play pickleball in Mountain Home, ID. There is 1 outdoor hard court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. The court is free.
